name: hdf5-to-zarr
description: Given an input HDF5 file URL, generate a Zarr References Specification JSON output.

scripts.generate-fixtures: pnpm run generate-fixtures-v2 && pnpm run generate-fixtures-v3
scripts.generate-fixtures-v2: uv run test/fixtures/generate_fixtures.py && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/minimal.adata.zarr test/fixtures/minimal.adata.zarr.json && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/dense.adata.zarr test/fixtures/dense.adata.zarr.json && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/sparse.adata.zarr test/fixtures/sparse.adata.zarr.json
scripts.generate-fixtures-v3: uv run test/fixtures/generate_fixtures_v3.py && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/minimal.v3.adata.zarr test/fixtures/minimal.v3.adata.zarr.json && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/dense.v3.adata.zarr test/fixtures/dense.v3.adata.zarr.json && node scripts/directory-to-memory-store.mjs test/fixtures/sparse.v3.adata.zarr test/fixtures/sparse.v3.adata.zarr.json
